$description: The named layout primitives every component and recipe composes from. Structural fields (axis, wrap, stacking behavior) are foundation's own law; gap values reference spacing tokens.

cluster.purpose: Wrapping row of inline items (tags, buttons, metadata).

grid.purpose: Responsive multi-column layout on the 12-column grid.

center.purpose: Horizontally centered content capped at the reading measure.

cover.purpose: Full-height region with vertically centered content (heroes).

split.purpose: Two-panel content + media layout that stacks on small screens.
